MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF ELLEN SEELING'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Brittany S. Armstrong, Esq. of Lawson Law Offices 510/878-7818 for pltf & moving party; Andrew S. Azarmi, Esq. of Luce, Forward, Hamilton & Scripps LLP 925/586-7375 for deft & opposing party Rrazz Entertainment West, Inc.; Johnny P. Ogata, Esq. of Scott D. Fisher, A Prof. Law Corp. 310/442-7171 for deft & opposing party Keely Smith (appearing via CourtCall).

RULING: Argued and the Court granted the motion in part as to amending the complaint to add party Rrazz Entertainment, Inc. and denying as to adding new causes of action. Plaintiff to prepare a proposed form of order, to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Ntc Of Mtn Seeking Sanctions Against Deft Rrazz Entertainment, Inc And Its Counsel Of Record

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ELLEN SEELING'S MOTION SEEKING SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT RRAZZ ENTERTAINMENT, INC AND ITS COUNSEL OF RECORD. Appearances: Brittany S. Armstrong of Lawson Law Offices (510.878.7818) for plaintiff and moving party; Anne M. Epperly of Luce Forward (356.4677) for defendant and responding party. Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for sanctions denied. The court will reconsider if a new motion is presented with new evidence. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
